subject: [RFC v2 11/21] mm: thp: handle split failure in userfaultfd move_pages()

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the handling of split failures and suggested adding a check for the PMD being huge before attempting to split it.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series proposes handling split failures in the userfaultfd move_pages() function by breaking out of the loop and returning -ENOMEM to the caller when a huge PMD cannot be split.
